    59|    steps:

    87|            -t ${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}:latest \

    93|          docker push ${{ steps.tag.outputs.ECR_URI }}:latest

    95|      - name: Update ECS task definition
    96|        id: task-def
    97|        run: |
    98|          CURRENT=$(aws ecs describe-task-definition \
    99|            --task-definition ${{ env.APP_NAME }}-api \
